title: SQL Query for Product Recommendations
scenario: Write a SQL query to recommend products to a customer based on their purchase history. The output should display the recommended products in a single column, with the most relevant product first.
constraints: Must use the GROUP BY clause to group products by category
Must use the ORDER BY clause to sort recommendations by relevance

evaluationCriteria.description: The query should be syntactically valid SQL
The query should meet the specified constraints
The query should accurately recommend products based on the customer's purchase history
